inputs.label: Car Value
inputs.businessContext: The current market value of the insured vehicle.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current market value of the insured vehicle.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der aktuelle Marktwert des versicherten Fahrzeugs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur actuelle sur le marché du véhicule assuré.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de mercado actual del vehículo asegurado.

inputs.label: Driver Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the primary driver; younger drivers often have higher risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the primary driver; younger drivers often have higher risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana sürücünün yaşı; genç sürücüler genellikle daha yüksek riske sahiptir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Hauptfahrers; jüngere Fahrer haben oft ein höheres Risiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du conducteur principal ; les conducteurs plus jeunes ont souvent un risque plus élevé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad del conductor principal; los conductores más jóvenes suelen tener mayor riesgo.

inputs.label: Driving Experience
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the driver has held a valid driving license.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years the driver has held a valid driving license.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürücünün geçerli bir sürücü belgesine sahip olduğu yıl sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, die der Fahrer einen gültigen Führerschein besitzt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pendant lesquelles le conducteur a détenu un permis de conduire valide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que el conductor ha tenido una licencia de conducir válida.

inputs.label: No-Claims Years
inputs.businessContext: Consecutive claim-free years; affects no-claims discount.

businessContext_i18n.en: Consecutive claim-free years; affects no-claims discount.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ardışık hasarsız yıllar; hasarsızlık indirimini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aufeinanderfolgende schadenfreie Jahre; beeinflusst den Schadenfreiheitsrabatt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Années consécutives sans sinistre ; affecte la réduction pour absence de sinistre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Años consecutivos sin siniestros; afecta el descuento por no siniestros.

inputs.label: Annual Mileage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated annual distance driven; higher mileage increases risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated annual distance driven; higher mileage increases risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahmini yıllık sürüş mesafesi; yüksek kilometre riski artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte jährliche Fahrleistung; höhere Kilometerzahl erhöht das Risiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance annuelle estimée parcourue ; un kilométrage plus élevé augmente le risque.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia anual estimada recorrida; un mayor kilometraje aumenta el riesgo.

inputs.label: Coverage Level
inputs.businessContext: Coverage type: 1=Third party, 2=Third party fire & theft, 3=Comprehensive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coverage type: 1=Third party, 2=Third party fire & theft, 3=Comprehensive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teminat türü: 1=Üçüncü şahıs, 2=Üçüncü şahıs yangın ve hırsızlık, 3=Kapsamlı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de couverture : 1=Tiers, 2=Tiers vol incendie, 3=Tous risques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de cobertura: 1=Terceros, 2=Terceros incendio y robo, 3=Todo riesgo.

inputs.label: Region Risk Factor
inputs.businessContext: Regional risk factor based on crime and accident statistics (1=lowest, 10=highest).

businessContext_i18n.en: Regional risk factor based on crime and accident statistics (1=lowest, 10=highest).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Suç ve kaza istatistiklerine dayalı bölgesel risk faktörü (1=en düşük, 10=en yüksek).
businessContext_i18n.de: Regionaler Risikofaktor basierend auf Kriminalitäts- und Unfallstatistiken (1=niedrigste, 10=höchste).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de risque régional basé sur les statistiques de criminalité et d'accidents (1=le plus bas, 10=le plus élevé).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de riesgo regional basado en estadísticas de delincuencia y accidentes (1=más bajo, 10=más alto).

inputs.label: Vehicle Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the vehicle; older cars may have different risk profiles.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the vehicle; older cars may have different risk profiles.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın yaşı; eski arabalar farklı risk profillerine sahip olabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Fahrzeugs; ältere Autos können unterschiedliche Risikoprofile aufweisen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du véhicule ; les voitures plus anciennes peuvent avoir des profils de risque différents.
businessContext_i18n.es: Antigüedad del vehículo; los autos más antiguos pueden tener diferentes perfiles de riesgo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
